results.overview: Officer Shivani Shivaji Roy returns to hunt down those behind the disappearance of young girls, risking everything to bring them back alive.
results.title: Mardaani 3

results.overview: As rival gangs, corrupt officials and a ruthless Major Iqbal close in, Hamza's mission for his country spirals into a bloody personal war where the line between patriot and monster disappears in the streets of Lyari.
results.title: Dhurandhar: The Revenge

results.overview: A descendant of the Vanara clan is pushed into conflict when a modern-day Ravana seizes his only bike for an election rally. What starts as a petty injustice soon erupts into a fierce fight for self-respect and dignity.
results.title: Vanaveera

results.overview: A mysterious traveler slips into the heart of Karachi's underbelly and rises through its ranks with lethal precision, only to tear the notorious ISI-Underworld nexus apart from within.
results.title: Dhurandhar

results.overview: When a mysterious child is found by a tribal couple near a roaring waterfall, they raise him as their own. As he grows, Sivudu is drawn to the world beyond the cliffs, where he discovers the ancient kingdom of Mahishmati, ruled by a cruel tyrant, haunted by rebellion, and bound to his past. What begins as a quest for love soon unravels a legacy of betrayal, sacrifice, and a forgotten prince.
results.title: Bāhubali: The Epic

results.overview: During the Kadamba reign, King Vijayendra, the ruler of the fictional feudatory land of Bangra, meets his final fate while venturing into the mystical forest of Kantara. Witnessing this, his son Rajashekara seals the borders of their realm. Later, Prince Kulashekara reopens them through a brutal massacre. The protagonist, Berme, in search of prosperity, crosses the divide and ignites a conflict of faith, power, and destiny between the Kingdom and Nature.
results.title: Kantara - A Legend: Chapter 1

results.overview: Chronically unsuccessful MI7 operative Happy Patel is finally assigned a mission in Goa, where he uncovers his Indian roots and must rescue a high-profile scientist from crime lord Mama. Unaware of his Indian heritage and armed with a comically British accent, Happy’s blunders trigger a string of chaotic mishaps that could lead him to expose a criminal network.
results.title: Happy Patel: Khatarnak Jasoos

results.overview: When a celebrated queer doctor in London is accused of sexual misconduct, her life unravels. Now under a storm of suspicion and scrutiny, her marriage fractures and the truth blurs. Her wife must decide whether to walk away, or fight for the woman the world is turning against.
results.title: Accused

results.overview: Four friends – Hashir, Alan, Ajin and Vinayak – are considered losers and troublemakers by parents, family and the school management. They face immense social pressure as they reach adulthood, embarking them on an emotional journey of self discovery and acceptance, where they finally learn to take up their responsibilities and find success
results.title: Vaazha II

results.overview: A woman from a small town in Tamil Nadu moves to South Korea — a place she always dreamed of — but struggles to find her footing in a foreign land.
results.title: Made in Korea

results.overview: Starring the sensational Gurnam Bhullar alongside the stunning Isha Malviya, this Punjabi cinema is crafted for every soul that has ever loved deeply. Directed by the talented Manvir Brar, Ishqa'n De Lekhe is set to redefine Punjabi romance on the big screen.
results.title: Ishqa'n De Lekhe

results.overview: A fictional history of two legendary revolutionaries' journey away from home before they began fighting for their country in the 1920s.
results.title: RRR

results.overview: A psychiatrist evaluating a self-confessed serial killer unravels a twisted web of trauma, deceit, and psychological manipulation—only to question if the killer is truly guilty or just another victim in a larger, darker game.
results.title: Stephen

results.overview: Three idealistic soldiers in the Indian army, navy and air force face grueling combat conditions in this film set during the 1971 Indo-Pak war.
results.title: Border 2

results.overview: Second Lieutenant and India's youngest Param Vir Chakra recipient, Arun Khetarpal, gave his life fighting for his battalion and the country during the 1971 Battle of Basantar. Ikkis also takes a reflective look at the futility of war through the eyes of Khetarpal's father, who visits his ancestral home in Sargodha and Alma Mater for reunion, which now happens to be in post-partition Pakistan, 30 years later.
results.title: Ikkis

results.overview: Seeking his lost grandfather, a young man enters a haunted mansion and awakens a family curse powerful enough to upend both his life and reality.
results.title: The Rajasaab

results.overview: Years ago Agent Kabir went rogue, became India’s greatest villain ever.  As he descends further into the deepest shadows... India sends its deadliest, most lethal agent after him, Agent Vikram  A Special Units Officer who is more than Kabir’s equal and a relentless Terminator driven by his own demons, determined to put a bullet into Kabir’s skull.
results.title: War 2

results.overview: Pavunuthaayi is a fiercely independent, intimidating elderly woman in a rural village, known for being tough, ruthless, and blunt-especially as a moneylender whose strict enforcement of dues makes her feared by locals.
results.title: Thaai Kizhavi

results.overview: Two artistic souls find harmony through music despite their contrasting worlds. As feelings deepen, age and circumstances challenge their undeniable bond.
results.title: Saiyaara

results.overview: After losing love, Panchi finds love through a voice on the same phone number, until truth, crime, and blood ties pull him into a dark spiral of fate.
results.title: Panchhi 2
